field.label: 1. Job Title and Location
field.placeholder: e.g. Senior Finance Officer — Port Vila
field.help_text: State the full job title and the physical location of the post.

field.label: 2. Level / Grade
field.placeholder: e.g. Grade 7 (suggested by Ministry — to be determined by PSC)
field.help_text: The level suggested by the Ministry. Final grading is determined by the PSC through the job evaluation process.

field.label: 3. Post Number
field.placeholder: Allocate the next available number
field.help_text: This number must be used in all subsequent correspondence relating to this post.

field.label: 4. Ministry
field.placeholder: e.g. Ministry of Finance and Economic Management

field.label: 5. Department
field.placeholder: e.g. Department of Finance

field.label: 6. Purpose — Why This Post Exists
field.placeholder: A concise one or two sentence statement of why this post exists — adapted from the Corporate Plan or Business Plan for higher-level posts.
field.help_text: For higher-level posts this should be adapted from the Corporate Plan or Business Plan. For junior posts a brief operational statement is sufficient.

field.label: 7.1 Duty / Responsibility
field.placeholder: Start with an action word. State the most important duty first.
field.help_text: Simple statements starting with an action word. Cover main areas of work — not procedural details. Areas: policy/research/advice, reports, external communication, administrative, legislative, financial delegation.

field.label: 7.2 Duty / Responsibility
field.placeholder: Start with an action word.

field.label: 7.3 Duty / Responsibility
field.placeholder: Start with an action word.

field.label: 7.4 Duty / Responsibility
field.placeholder: Start with an action word.

field.label: 7.5 Duty / Responsibility
field.placeholder: Start with an action word.

field.label: 7.6 Duty / Responsibility
field.placeholder: Start with an action word.

field.label: 7.7 Duty / Responsibility
field.placeholder: Start with an action word.

field.label: 7.8 Duty / Responsibility
field.placeholder: Start with an action word.

field.label: 7.9 Duty / Responsibility
field.placeholder: Start with an action word.

field.label: 8. Reports Directly To
field.placeholder: Title of Post and Level only — e.g. Director of Corporate Services (Grade 10)
field.help_text: State the title and level of the post this position reports to. Do not use a person's name.

field.label: 9. Directly Supervises
field.placeholder: Title of Posts and Level supervised, if any — e.g. Finance Officer Grade 5 (×2), Data Entry Clerk Grade 3 (×1). State "None" if not applicable.
field.help_text: List the titles and levels of all posts directly supervised. State "None" if this is not a supervisory post.

field.label: 10. Frequent Internal Personal Contacts With …
field.placeholder: List positions within the Ministry that this post contacts regularly (weekly/monthly). e.g. Director-General, Budget Officer, Payroll Unit.
field.help_text: "Internal" means within the Ministry or Department.

field.label: 11. Occasional Internal Personal Contacts With …
field.placeholder: List positions within the Ministry that this post contacts less frequently (quarterly or as needed).

field.label: 12. Frequent External Personal Contacts With …
field.placeholder: List organisations, agencies or community groups this post contacts regularly. e.g. OPSC, Ministry of Finance, Audit Office, development partners.
field.help_text: "External" means other Ministries, government agencies, and the broader community.

field.label: 13. Occasional External Personal Contacts With …
field.placeholder: List organisations or individuals this post contacts occasionally or as needed.

field.label: Impact, Conditions and Reason for Approval
14a. Impact of Decisions — Key Decisions Made Independently
field.placeholder: Name the more important decisions this post makes without assistance on a regular basis (weekly or monthly) to greatly reduce the risk of serious things happening. e.g. Authorises procurement requests up to VUV 500,000; approves leave for direct reports.
field.help_text: Focus on decisions made independently that would have significant consequences if made incorrectly.

field.label: 14b. Financial Delegation (if applicable)
field.placeholder: e.g. VUV 500,000 per transaction. State "None" if not applicable.
field.help_text: If this post has a significant financial delegation to commit funds, state the maximum amount.

field.label: 15. Special Conditions
field.placeholder: e.g. Required to travel to outer islands; on-call after hours; operates specialised equipment; works in a remote location. State "None" if not applicable.
field.help_text: Include any unusual work hours, travel requirements, physical conditions, or equipment operation requirements.

field.label: 16. Reason for Seeking Approval
field.choices: Routine Revision of Existing Job Description New Post Regrading (Upgrade) Regrading (Downgrade) Other

field.label: 16. Additional Details (overlap, duplication, or new duties)
field.placeholder: State if there is any overlap or duplication with existing Job Descriptions, or describe any new duties and responsibilities being added. Required if "Other" selected above.

field.label: 17. Minimum Qualifications to be Selected for This Post
17.1 Experience
field.placeholder: e.g. Minimum 3 years experience in financial management; or demonstrated achievement in leading teams; or experience in filing and keyboard work. Allow for some on-the-job training for external candidates.
field.help_text: State years or level of experience. For junior posts: filing, keyboard, driving. For senior posts: leadership, communication, managing resources, advising, writing reports. Allow for on-the-job training — do not unnecessarily restrict the pool.

field.label: 17.2 Special Skills
field.placeholder: e.g. Valid driver's licence; clean driving record; proficiency in MYOB / Excel; experience with GIS software. State "None" if not applicable.
field.help_text: Include licences, certifications, or technical skills directly required for the role.

field.label: 17.3 Education
field.placeholder: e.g. Degree in Accounting or related field — an advantage; Certificate in Office Administration — desirable. Remember: education is only one indicator of capability.
field.help_text: Education is mostly "an advantage" or "highly desirable" — do not unnecessarily bias the post toward certain academic pathways. Capability to do the job is the primary measure.

field.label: 17.4 Language
field.placeholder: English or French and Bislama
field.help_text: "English or French and Bislama" is the standard requirement for most posts in Vanuatu Public Service.

field.label: 17.5 Good Character
field.placeholder: Confirmed — Good Character applies to this post (as it applies to all posts)

field.label: 18.1 Prepared in the Ministry by — Name
field.placeholder: Full name of the person who prepared this Job Description

field.label: 18.2 Certified by or for the Director-General — Name
field.placeholder: Full name of the Director-General or authorised certifier
field.help_text: Certifies that the post fits with any Corporate Plan and is operationally required.

field.label: 18.3 Checked by PSC — Name
field.placeholder: Name of PSC officer who checked completeness, consistency, structure, level and post number
field.help_text: PSC checks for completeness and consistency; confirms Level and Post Number through the job evaluation process.

field.label: 18.4 Decision of the Public Service Commission
field.help_text: To be completed by the PSC after deliberation.

field.label: 18.4 PSC Decision — Name of Commissioner / Officer
field.placeholder: Name of PSC Commissioner or Officer recording the decision

field.label: Ministry Advised and Records Updated
field.placeholder: Confirmed — Ministry has been advised of the PSC decision and all records have been updated
field.help_text: To be ticked by the PSC Action Officer once the Ministry has been formally notified.

field.label: PSC Action Officer — Name
field.placeholder: Name of PSC Action Officer who advised the Ministry and updated records
